commands.review_summary:
This PR filters Control UI sidebar Recent sessions by the active agent and adds a render regression test for mixed Main/Work agent sessions.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +53. Total +75 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection and the linked issue review show a high-confidence path: render mixed-agent sessions in sessionsResult while one agent is selected, and current main's sidebar resolver has no selected-agent predicate.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated code repair is needed; the contributor or maintainer should add real browser proof, then review and land the open PR with the linked issue.

target.title: fix #88214: [Feature]: Dashboard sidebar Recent sessions should filter by currently selected agent
target.body:
## Summary

- Behavior or issue addressed: dashboard sidebar Recent sessions no longer mixes sessions from other agents when an agent-scoped chat is active.
- Filter the dashboard sidebar Recent session list to the currently selected agent.
- Keep legacy non-agent session keys visible only for the default agent, while preserving existing exclusions for archived, cron, global, unknown, subagent, and spawned sessions.
- Add a render-level regression test that mixes Main and Work agent sessions and verifies the sidebar only lists the active Work agent sessions.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: dashboard sidebar Recent sessions no longer mixes sessions from other agents when an agent-scoped chat is active.
- Real environment tested: jsdom render of the real Lit `renderApp` sidebar through the UI unit project, plus UI TypeScript validation.
- Evidence after fix: `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88214-evidence/ui-vitest-app-render-sidebar-targeted.log` and `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88214-evidence/ui-tsgo-test-ui.log`.
- Target test file: `ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts`
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `cd /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-88214/ui && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project unit src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts`.
- `pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project unit src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts`
  - Evidence: `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88214-evidence/ui-vitest-app-render-sidebar-targeted.log`
  - Result: `Test Files 1 passed (1)`, `Tests 6 passed (6)`
- Observed result after fix: the rendered sidebar Recent labels are `Work new` and `Work older`; the Main agent session is excluded for the active Work agent.
- The regression renders `renderApp` on the chat route with mixed Main and Work sessions, then reads `.sidebar-recent-session__name` from the actual sidebar DOM and confirms only `Work new` and `Work older` are shown.
- What was not tested: live browser smoke, because this CLI session does not provide an interactive browser target.

## Regression Test Plan

- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_HEAVY_CHECK_LOCK_SCOPE=worktree pnpm --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-88214 tsgo:test:ui` and `cd /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-88214/ui && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project unit src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts`.
- `OPENCLAW_HEAVY_CHECK_LOCK_SCOPE=worktree pnpm --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-88214 tsgo:test:ui`
  - Evidence: `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88214-evidence/ui-tsgo-test-ui.log`
- `cd ui && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project unit src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts`
  - Evidence: `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88214-evidence/ui-vitest-app-render-sidebar-targeted.log`
- What was not tested: live browser smoke, because this CLI session does not provide an interactive browser target.

## Root Cause

- Root cause: the dashboard sidebar Recent list only filtered out non-user-facing session types and then sorted globally, so agent-scoped dashboard sessions from other agents remained eligible for the active agent's sidebar.
- The top-level chat/session state already carries the selected agent through agent-prefixed session keys and agent selection state; the sidebar list needed to apply the same selected-agent boundary before slicing recent sessions.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
